thesis_summary: Long bias remains valid only if the opening pullback holds above breakout demand and price reclaims VWAP/28240 by mid-morning.

checks.label: Price holds above breakout demand
checks.rationale: A clean bullish day should not lose the upper breakout shelf before cash open.

checks.label: Opening dip is reclaimed
checks.rationale: The preferred setup is not blind continuation; it is a dip that buyers absorb quickly.

checks.label: First 30 minutes avoids demand failure
checks.rationale: Breaking below 28000 would turn the setup from controlled pullback into failed breakout.

checks.label: Reclaim above 28240 by mid-morning
checks.rationale: A reclaim above 28240 confirms buyers are rebuilding control above the breakout base.

checks.label: Price above session VWAP
checks.rationale: Afternoon continuation is unlikely if price remains below VWAP after the opening auction.
